_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: fenics poisson numerical-correctness gate. Runs the catalog-recommended API surface (basix.ufl.element, fem.functionspace, dirichletbc with locate_dofs_topological, LinearProblem with petsc_options ksp_type=preonly + pc_type=lu + mumps) end-to-end against a manufactured solution u = sin(π·x)·sin(π·y), f = 2π²·sin(π·x)·sin(π·y) on [0,1]². Asserts (a) P1 nx=32 L2 error <= 2e-3, (b) P2 nx=32 L2 error <= 1e-5, (c) P3 nx=32 L2 error <= 2e-7, (d) P1 estimated order of convergence h=1/16 → h=1/32 falls in [1.7, 2.3] (theoretical 2.0). This is Layer C: proves the catalog's output is NUMERICALLY CORRECT, not just well-formed. Counterpart to Layer A (symbol presence), Layer B (generators run), Layer E (MCP wrappers route correctly). Verified empirically against dolfinx 0.10.0 + PETSc + MUMPS on 2026-06-01: P1=1.320e-3, P2=7.142e-6, P3=1.009e-7, P1 EOC=1.993.
